title: astragalus angustifolius subsp. echinoides
intro: Astragalus angustifolius subsp. echinoides, also known as the narrow-leaved milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate fatigue. The health benefits of Astragalus angustifolius subsp. echinoides include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and enhance respiratory function. Astragalus angustifolius subsp. echinoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
